meta.purpose: Capability stages, practice loops, and measurable indicators.
meta.load_condition: Load for learning, team standards, audits, or progressive quality improvement.

capability_layers.name: Profile-driven performance
indicators: every animation profiled on throttled hardware
frame budget defined and enforced per interaction
will-change used sparingly and cleaned up
scroll performance tested with 6x CPU slowdown

capability_layers.name: Performance engineering culture
indicators: animation frame budget enforced in CI
device tier matrix defines animation complexity per tier

practice_loop: profile the current animation with DevTools
replace layout-triggering properties with compositor equivalents
test on throttled hardware and with reduced-motion
document the frame budget in the component
